name: autorelease: pending
description: Owned by release-please: the open Release PR / the PR to tag after merge. Do not remove by hand — release-label-guard.yml restores it (removing it would skip the release).

name: autorelease: tagged
description: Owned by release-please: the Release PR merged and its vX.Y.Z tag + GitHub Release were cut.

name: release: approved
description: Human approval gate: add to a Release PR to open the release-gate check and allow merge (ADR-0035). Remove to un-approve.

name: sbom-vuln
description: Opened by sbom-monitor.yml when osv-scanner finds a vulnerability in a shipped SBOM.

name: mise-outdated
description: Opened by mise-outdated.yml when a mise-pinned tool drifted from its latest release.
